PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-10-2015 is admitted to probate. Stephen Merlo is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-13-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Continued To Nov-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
